title: Orders that aren't cancelled (messy data)
prompt: Heads up: this data is messy — you'll need to account for that. Count the orders that are NOT cancelled (treat a missing status as not cancelled). Single column: orders.
hints: Some rows have a missing status — and in SQL, `status <> 'cancelled'` quietly drops NULLs (they compare as UNKNOWN).
Count them with IS DISTINCT FROM: WHERE status IS DISTINCT FROM 'cancelled'.
